hooks.command: input=$(cat); sid=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".session_id // \"nosess\"" 2>/dev/null); marker="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/claude-structure-reminder-$sid"; [ -f "$marker" ] && exit 0; appchanges=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^.{2} app/"); structurechanges=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^.{2} Structure/"); if [ -n "$appchanges" ] && [ -z "$structurechanges" ]; then touch "$marker"; printf "%s" "{\"systemMessage\":\"Reminder: code under app/ changed but Structure/ docs were not updated this session. Per the Keep Structure/ current rule in CLAUDE.md, review whether decisions-product.md, decisions-technical.md, checkpoints.md, structure.md (or section-library.md / design-system.md / alerts.md), or unfinished_work.md need updating.\"}"; fi; exit 0

Stop.description: Batched typecheck of files edited this session (opt-in: CAMEL_TYPECHECK=1)

PreToolUse.description: Block the Liquid mirror during ordinary work; demand a heads-up on high-consequence files
Block raw hex (incl. var() fallbacks) in *.styles.ts sub-variant payloads; nudge on hardcoded px

PostToolUse.description: Record edited paths for the Stop-time cross-file checks
